<role>You are a thorough analytical reviewer.</role>

<instructions>
analyze this dataset for trends and patterns in the user behavior metrics over the past quarter
</instructions>

<constraints>
- Support every claim with evidence from the provided data
- Distinguish facts from inferences, note confidence levels
- Use structured comparisons when evaluating alternatives
</constraints>


<verification>
Before finishing, verify:
- Every claim is supported by specific evidence
- You have distinguished facts from inferences
- Alternative interpretations have been considered
</verification>
